overall.summary: Very good performance with a solid understanding of most topics.

strengths: Good understanding of key OOP concepts.
Good recall of Java platform/components and APIs.
Strong performance in conceptual True/False distinctions.
weaknesses: There are weaknesses in core OOP concepts such as abstraction, encapsulation, inheritance, or polymorphism.
Java fundamentals and platform-related concepts need more review.
Programming/code-completion answers need more attention to exact logic and final syntax.
recommendations: Revise OOP fundamentals: OOP vs POP, encapsulation, abstraction, inheritance, and polymorphism.
Review Java platform/components and common APIs such as JRE, AWT, MVC, Container, and JDBC.
Practice conceptual True/False questions and pay close attention to the exact wording of each statement.
Practice short code-completion questions and verify the exact final output, method call, and expression.
Memorize short Java technical terms and standard definitions more precisely.
